message:
feat(validate): implement model-level validators (bd-3w42)

Add support for model-level validators that run on the entire model:
- ValidatorMode enum (Before, After)
- ModelValidator struct for parsed validator definitions
- Parsing for #[validate(model = "fn")] simple form
- Parsing for #[validate(model(fn = "fn", mode = "before"))] extended form
- add_model_error method on ValidationError
- ValidationErrorKind::Model variant

Validators with mode="before" run before field validation.
Validators with mode="after" (default) run after field validation.

8 new tests for model validator parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
